description_long: This house features a beige exterior with a steep, dark gray gable roof and a symmetrical facade. The front includes a main entry door, a large sign reading 'wetherspoon', and two outdoor seating areas with round tables and blue umbrellas on a wooden deck. There are two prominent dormer-like roof sections and a small awning above a side window or service hatch. The side and rear walls are plain, with minimal architectural detailing and no visible windows. The structure sits on a paved base, with a clear separation between the outdoor seating area and the main building.
description: A beige house with a steep gable roof, front sign, and outdoor seating with blue umbrellas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain gable end, two blue umbrellas, and part of the outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the dark gray gable roof and rectangular footprint.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the gable end and the outdoor seating area extending from the building.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry, 'wetherspoon' sign, two blue umbrellas, and outdoor seating area.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with a small step, adjacent awning, and a prominent sign above; outdoor seating area with umbrellas in front.
